result.stdout:
Usage: arklint [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                     
                                                                                
 The architectural rulebook for your codebase. Prevention, not detection.       
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --version  -v        Show version and exit.                                  │
│ --help               Show this message and exit.                             │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ init       Create a starter .arklint.yml in the current directory.           │
│ check      Scan the codebase against your architectural rules.               │
│ watch      Watch for file changes and re-run checks automatically.           │
│ validate   Validate .arklint.yml without running any checks.                 │
│ export     Export rules as an AI assistant instruction file.                 │
│ learn      Generate an arklint rule from a plain-English description using   │
│            AI.                                                               │
│ search     Search available official rule packs.                             │
│ add        Add an official rule pack to your .arklint.yml.                   │
│ mcp        Start the arklint MCP server (stdio transport) for AI agent       │
│            integration.                                                      │
│ visualize  Generate a Mermaid diagram of your architecture rules.            │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
